case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. RUTHIE PIERRE-STITT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PIERRE-STITT, RUTHIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERRE-STITT, RUTHIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 134 KISKA ROAD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF BILL FORD IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION DALY RENTAL VALUE IS $4.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JUL-03-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT PIERRE-STITT, RUTHIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JUL-03-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PIERRE-STITT, RUTHIE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT PIERRE-STITT, RUTHIE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
